summary:
POLITICAL AND ECONOMIC PREDICTIONS CONCERNING DONALD TRUMP: Brandon states that Donald Trump is under intense spiritual attack, specifically facing a demonic assault on his mind involving pride and the influence of ungodly counsel. Brandon recounts a vision from 2020 where Trump was designated as a wartime president, describing this as a distraction orchestrated by spiritual enemies. Brandon shares visions of Trump parading a pig wearing makeup, a fragile and transparent housing market, a minor wave occurring during the midterm elections, and the rise of a new economic beast system involving the Middle East, oil wealth, Saudi Arabia, and new cryptocurrency legislation. Brandon also mentions a vision of four prayer wariors carrying Trump across a finish line because Trump has concrete cinder blocks attached to his feet.

VISIONS OF GEOPOLITICAL CONFLICT AND ASSASSINATION ATTEMPTS: Brandon describes a visitation detailing a planned assassination attempt on Donald Trump by a military-trained Russian sniper wearing black clothing and using a massive .50 caliber weapon. The event involves Secret Service panic and negotiations between Emmanuel Macron and the Russian government. According to Brandon, this incident triggers an immediate retaliation leading to a devastating World War III in Europe utilizing conventional weapons. Brandon also shares a vision involving virgin sacrifices in Berlin, Germany, tied to an attempt to bring forth a Mahdi and a Hitler-like spirit to initiate a major European war.

POLITICAL FIGURES AND END-TIMES TIMELINES: Brandon shares specific imagery regarding political figures, including JD Vance walking through barren, black oak trees in the snow toward the White House, while his pregnant wife listens behind a door wearing a Hindu-style pink, green, and yellow outfit. Other visions feature a demonic black bird attacking Trump's mind, a peacock wrapping around the Capitol, JD Vance with an unstable bobblehead, and Marco Rubio looking up from the bottom of steps with huge eyes. Brandon also details timelines regarding the end times, suggesting that the upcoming Shemitah cycle in 2028 or 2029 aligns with the seven-year tribulation period, five major global shakings, and the implementation of a global digital currency system tied to a physical mark.

INTERNATIONAL SPIRITUAL INTERVENTIONS AND REVIVALS: Brandon reports seeing a giant divine foot wearing a sandal crushing the head of a slithering cobra over Panama, signifying a moment of deliverance. Brandon foresees major spiritual revivals and awakenings occurring across Cuba, Venezuela, Brazil, Argentina, Colombia, Africa, and Asia. This global awakening is described as a necessary shift that will empty secular venues and ignite churches with spiritual fire, mirroring the historical Welsh revival and acting as the only true method to save the nation from moral decay.

DEMONIC OBSTACLES TO THE SAVE AMERICA ACT: Brandon outlines a vision where the Save America Act is blocked by a dark, generational principality located in a New York City tower connected to immense financial wealth, bankers, and a geographic triangle reaching Canada, France, England, and Spain. This entity is depicted as black bull, surrounded by people in masquerade masks and hoods. Brandon asserts that this demonic stronghold draws its power and access from the blood of aborted children through organizations like Planned Parenthood, making abortion the spiritual root that feeds the political blockade. 

STRATEGIC DEMONIC TIMELINES AND PUBLIC EVENTS: Brandon warns of a concentrated spiritual darkness surrounding specific dates in April, specifically the 18th, 19th, 20th, and 30th. These dates are linked to historical tragedies and figures, including the Columbine school shooting, the Oklahoma City bombing involving Timothy McVeigh, and the birth and death of Adolf Hitler. Brandon connects this demonic timeline to upcoming public gatherings, specifically mentioning a vision of a white, transparent side-winding cobra at the Coachella festival, which is associated with human trafficking and the targeting of young girls. Brandon urges focused intercession over these events, the Boston Marathon, hospitals, mass transit systems, oil refineries along the Gulf Coast, and Jewish synagogues to prevent acts of terrorism, drone strikes, and destruction.
rawData: [April 14, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/ZvDla0vHYoY]-[Good evening, family. Thank you for joining us again today. We're going to pray for President Trump tonight a lot, and we're going to pray for our nation a lot. There's a lot of stuff going on with President Trump. I have told you countless times about the necessity of praying for our president more than we've ever prayed for him before, especially with the attacks that are on his mind. The things that we have seen, I believe, are accurate and proved to be so in the news as we see some of the things that are happening. Now, I know every time I say something, I have everybody and their brother emailing me saying he didn't mean this or he didn't mean that. It happened at Easter time with praise of law and the things that happened. I said, "This is not normal." They say, "Well, he's just messing around." How do you know? Do you know him? I know him by the spirit. I pray for him more than I pray for my own family. And the Lord told me he's under attack. Regardless of whether you want to receive that or not, Sister Clipboard, it's the truth. I'm trying to tell you, we need to intercede for this man more than we ever have before as the body of Christ. The Lord stood right here and He came in and delivered me a message one night. He said, "I don't want you going live; I have something I have to say." So I carried it for over a week and brought it to people. And when I delivered that message, boy, did I stir up the whole internet with that word. I backed away from it because I said, "Lord, I delivered it exactly the way You said. I didn't add to or take away from anything." I said, "I am released from it." I walked away and didn't mention it again because of the persecution and the hate I got from big prophetic voices around the nations telling me how false it was. But I said, "I'm seeing something that's coming, but most people don't see that." I said you must pray for him regarding an attack that's trying to come on his mind and these things concerning his flesh so that he's able to make it through even midterms. I said they'll try to impeach him if they get the House and the Senate. I saw it in all the things that the Lord has warned us about. It's about a spirit of pride; pride is going to try to set in on him. It's that Antichrist spirit. They're doing all these occultic things against his life to try to take him down. Whenever you are not thinking right and you are weak and tired, you need more rest. You do stupid stuff sometimes—all of us do, regardless of who we are. I'm not trying to dishonor anybody, but we do things that you normally wouldn't do if you had more rest and time to think about things, and you're not underneath the persecution from the fake news media. You've got all the weight of the nations on your shoulders as you're trying to navigate through this because we are in the last of the last days. Whether you want to acknowledge that or not, the signs of the times are all around us. One of the things that I want to remind you of was in 2020. The Lord showed us on November 24th of 2020, right after he won the election, the Lord came. I was cleaning out my car and He said this to me: "Trump will be known as a wartime president." And I thought, "Well, that's not good." Trump will be known as a wartime president. I told Braden to look for that because I remember when the Lord said it. He said, "Trump will be known as a wartime president." Then where's the other clip? The one where I was sitting on the couch with mama? This was on November 25th, the day after Diana came on with me, and this is what the Lord had me talk to you all about. When I was praying today, the Lord brought up in my spirit that the enemy is going to try to make a wartime president out of Trump as a delay and a distraction through his four years of what God's trying to do. The antichrist is trying to rise up and provoke the bear right now. The Lord is wanting to give an extended period of grace and peace to the people with blessing, increase, and favor with what I've seen coming in 2025 and 2026. I've seen the plague, I've seen the crash—I've seen all that. But I'm telling you, whenever we prayed as hard as we did in October, we were turning that ship. But the enemy is not wanting to go quietly. We know we have authority, and we are seated with Jesus in the heavenlies. This is what the Lord has warned us about—a wartime president. And the Lord said, "I want to give you more time." If we stand in the gap and pray for President Trump, we can turn this thing. As we were turning it in prayer, I told you about the foundation for the new industrial revolution in February. I gave that word right after this; it was in February. The Lord said a new industrial revolution and all the crypto and things that are trying to happen. We were praying against the Supreme Court justice ruling against the tariffs and the things that were trying to save America and our economy from paddling. I saw the pig again last night walking down the road with President Trump. He is going to present a pig in the days ahead. You will see a pig with lipstick on that has eyeshadow and blush, and this pig is going to look really nice and pretty. He's going to be walking the pig down the street, but the pig is still a pig. President Trump is going to parade it. And I saw a transparent-looking housing market that was trying to go up but was not solid. I could see through it. I saw a wave that was small that would try to be for the midterms, trying to say everything's going to be okay. This is just about the American economy and the things that I've seen concerning where we are with the end times. We're about to see the beast system come into play soon concerning Europe and other nations. But I saw the Middle East rising up with MBS and other nations like Iraq that will have a brotherhood. And he showed me the oil wealth and the great fountains of wealth from the Middle East. And I saw Babylon rising again. I saw financial blessing coming through oil wealth and things happening through Saudi Arabia. And they would go alongside crypto and have new crypto legislation and join up with certain crypto blockchain. And so, as we see what happened today—last night when we were actually in prayer and he posted the picture of him laying hands like we saw—I had the benefit of the doubt to say, 'Listen, man, he was trying to be a disciple.' Then he said he was trying to be a doctor and all these other things. People go, 'Are you going to continue making excuses for this man like you did at Easter?' And I get the emails. Listen, I don't make excuses for anybody other than I just say, 'Hey, he's tired.' Do you believe, Brandon, that this could be the Antichrist? I don't believe that Trump is the Antichrist. Do I believe that the antichrist spirit—that demonic spirit that I told you is trying to come on the nations—could be influencing, trying to mess with him? Yes. I believe it's the same thing what I told you. I saw them doing virgin sacrifices in Iran—I'm sorry, excuse me, in Germany, in the Berlin area—and I saw them trying to bring forth the Mahdi, this spirit like a Hitler spirit over Europe with major war, and I saw World War III over Europe. It was trying to bring forth what you're about to hear right here. Why I brought this? Because I want you to play this, Braden. Now, this was not a popular word, but I know what I had. The visitation where Jesus stood there, right here in my house in the vision with three angels, and it changed my life. These experiences, the anointing, will change you. And people say, 'I don't believe it.' I don't care what you believe. If you don't want to believe it, fine. But if you don't want to pray for him, then why are you even here in the first place other than just a troll? We need to pray for our president because this is what I saw trying to happen to him. Go ahead and play this. This was back in January. Can you play it? The Lord Jesus came and told me, 'Your president is about to be taken out by an assassin.' He said, 'I hold the church accountable for what is about to take place in this nation.' And as I was sitting here, I saw the whole thing pan out in front of me. He showed the whole thing. The angels were behind him. The glory came into my house. And I started yelling. I said, 'Lord, how is this going to happen? We have prayed for this man. We have interceded. We have stood in the gap. We've done everything.' And he said, 'The church as a whole. You're not the church by yourself, Brandon. Their channel is not the church by itself. The church as a mass whole.' He said pride has come into his heart. Pride has come in and he has opened a door through counsel of ungodly people advising him on what to do concerning the nations. And because he has opened this door from counsel and that demonic spirit that I saw poking his brain, influencing his thoughts, the church is supposed to pray. And the Lord showed me decisions that were being made were not what he wanted. And because of these decisions, it was opening a door for a demonic attack. As I saw this and I saw pride fill his heart and I saw arrogance starting to slip into him, I saw a covering that was not covering him on his front side. He was coming down—it looked like Air Force One or something—and I saw a man a long ways away with a.50 caliber weapon that had a scope on it that big. He had a black stocking hat, black shirt, black pants, and black combat boots, and he was laying on his belly focusing in. When I saw this incident happen, I saw the projectile go through his body—it was awful. The Secret Service didn't even know in this situation where to go. And I'm telling you, this is very serious to me. And I'm telling you all, this is very hard to even talk about this, but I feel by the spirit of God, we must pray. And I believe we can stop this. I want to say that I'm a watchman and even with the ear and everything that the Lord has shown me, it's been very precise, I believe, concerning this man's life and praying for our economy, praying for the things that I have seen. And I love him. I love his family. And I'm not here to—I want to make that very clear because I know I have law enforcement watching me—but this is a very serious thing. I brought it to the elders of the church to pray and this is exactly what I have seen. And I bring the good, the bad, and the ugly. I always do. And I'm precise. I don't add to anything, and I do not take away anything from it. But as I saw what I saw, I saw this scope on this firearm that was that big. It was huge. And he was from a long ways. And he was military trained and he was Russian. And I saw Macron and him negotiating and talking things through, and it was Macron and the Russian government. When this happened, I saw the Secret Service looking everywhere. They couldn't see how far it came or how it happened, and they were in a panic on the ground and I watched the whole thing happen. I saw immediately World War III pan across my face and a major war broke out in Europe of the likes of which we've never seen before. It was a retaliation immediately for what just happened to our leader. It was the most awful bombardment of missile strikes because of what he has set in place if anything ever happens to him to retaliate immediately with vicious force. And when this happened, I saw a bombardment the likes of which we've never seen before of any generation with conventional weapons. Like I told you, a wound that will not be fatal to the church, but it will bring the bride to the side. It will shake the nations. It will shake things. As I have prayed over this, I saw JD Vance walking through oak trees. They were black as onyx. They were all spread out. And every single oak tree was the same around and the same height, and they were all barren with no leaves on them at all. It looked like something that had been charred by some kind of volcanic fire or some kind of something that the trees were dead, but they were all identical. And they looked all around him. And he walked through these trees. There was white snow or whatever this was all over the ground. He was wearing a black trench coat that went to the mid of his calf, similar to what he wears. It looked like a dark blue, but I couldn't really tell because he was black and white. The trees were black. They all looked the same. And I think each tree represented a year. I believe from what I have seen there was at least six to seven trees. I'm still trying to go over it over and over in my spirit. 'Lord, show me how many trees that was and what did the trees represent,' because I know it was a metaphor. There was something to this. As I saw him walking through the snow in these trees, he went to the White House and he sat down behind the desk. He had a look on his face—not a smirk, not a grin—but he was just looking as I saw his wife pregnant. She was big and pregnant. Her belly button was sticking through her clothes because of how pregnant she was. She was standing behind the door listening to the conversation that her husband was having. She had a Hindu-looking outfit on that was pink with outline embroidery with a green, John Deere-colored belt on. It was pink, green, and yellow, and it looked like something of Middle Eastern descent like a Hindu shawl. Her face was not veiled. It was a pink outfit. As I watched this, and I say this very carefully because I'm just telling you what I saw in this visitation that I had with Jesus. Okay, this is where I am cautious. I'm not accusing anyone, but I'm just telling you. I'm not adding to, and I'm not taking away from anything. You saw this couch; it's not important to keep going. This is what's been on my heart so heavy today because of the picture and because of other things. "Oh, he's just playing." No, this is something that the Lord said is of the heart. There's something with the heart; it's the motive behind the photo, regardless if it's teasing or not. What I'm telling you is that it's trying to be a root that's displaying bad fruit. And the Lord said, "Pray for this man. He's under great pressure." And I'm holding the church accountable to intercede for Donald Trump. I say this with great conviction to warn you all of what I'm seeing is trying to come to pass. It's looking around you at photos like this that are—well, you know—and he says, "I was trying to be a doctor." People are asking me, "Is he trying to be the antichrist?" I mean, you can't imagine all the emails I got today about this photo and people being upset. Well, he's just playing. Well, then he said, "I'm just trying to pretend I'm a doctor," and all these other things. But it obviously upset a lot of you. I just try to go, "I'm not touching it because I know what I've seen," and I know what the Lord has warned me to pray and why I have taken this so seriously: the call that's on my life to intercede for America, to intercede for the protection of His children, to intercede for his marriage and his health, and to carry him over the threshold into the end zone because the Lord said he can't do this without the body of Christ. He will not make it. The Lord said there would need to be one. And I saw four major people picking him up and carrying him into the end zone. He had big concrete cinder blocks on his feet and he was trying, but he couldn't make it because he was working so hard at doing this. And that's why I'm trying to tell you tonight: we must pray for him. Now, people are so upset. "I'm not praying for him anymore. I can't believe he's so blasphemous. He's this. He's that." Oh my goodness. I told you what I told you: pride. Remember, pride opens the door to his front side. Pride enters into the man's heart and opens a door. That's what the Lord said. Pride, arrogance. You like Jesus laying hands on people? Listen, this is the fruit that is part of the root. Regardless if you want to look at it or not, the root is displaying some fruit. You better listen to me. You better pray for this man. This is the most high alert. You should be praying for our nation more than you've ever prayed for America before: praying for the prayer agreement in May, for the rededication, praying for our nation, praying for all of it. Whenever President Trump said—and Franklin Graham came out and said, "If you confess Jesus Christ as your Lord and Savior," and was trying to encourage him that if you have Jesus Christ, you're born again—he said, "I don't know if I'll make it to heaven." He doesn't know the things he said. Listen, it's not my place to ever judge a man. My place is to do what Jesus asked me to do when He stood right here and said, "Pray for him." I'm asking you as a fellow believer to really, really get your head out of the sand and really look around you at the signs of the times and the pressure that one might be facing right now, more than what you could ever comprehend. I said he was at the Resolute Desk, and he was writing down, and he was trying to think, and I saw a demonic attack against his mind; it looked like a black bird. Then I saw a big peacock on the Capitol; it was wrapped around the Capitol, but the feathers were not all feathered out. And I saw JD Vance with a massive bobblehead—his neck was not strong and it was bobbling all around—and he was looking toward the White House. And I saw Rubio with huge eyes at the bottom of the steps looking at him. You remember as Trump was no longer there, I saw a peacock over that area. And I've tried to warn you about all this stuff to pray. Do I feel like JD Vance is a bad man? I'm not going to sit and say, "I know JD Vance." I haven't prayed for JD Vance like I've prayed for Donald Trump. That's not a fair statement. I know I've seen in part and heard in part concerning JD Vance and concerning if he will be president in 2028. Praying for Rubio, praying for the next term if the Lord tarries. I pray with all my heart, y'all, that Jesus Christ comes back this next Shemitah cycle and we're not here. If that's the case, we're right at the edge of the revival that could take place any time in the summer. And I told you it will be toward the summer months when the Lord showed me that it would start—the revival would start in the summer months and go all the way—and then all the things that I've seen, that we will go into the Shemitah cycle when this timeframe takes place. Is that this one going into 2028, 2029? God, I hope so. Wouldn't that be wonderful? But if it is not, it is because we know that the tribulation is a Shemitah cycle of seven years. So we believe—what I believe—is that the tribulation will be at the beginning of a Shemitah cycle of a seven-year timeframe. So, the end of this seven-year cycle is 2028, 2029. That would be the time of this. That's why I have to keep telling you. I know I'm seeing into the tribulation. I don't know what year this is—2028? I'm going past 2028. I don't know. There's a lot of people who say, "Brandon, we have fifty-six years left, at least a hundred years." I don't believe that. I truly believe with all my heart that Jesus Christ is waiting for the harvest. The Lord said, "I'm standing at the door waiting for the harvest. I have long patience for it." But now, I'm no longer out of patience—I am out of time. This dispensation of grace is coming to an end. So God's never going to run out of patience. He loves us. But there is a timeframe that's been set into motion of when He knows when it's going to happen. Right? So we know that the domino is about to fall. Are you ready? The harvest is plentiful and the laborers are few. And He said, "I want my harvest. Brandon, help me. Will you help me?" I saw Jesus's hands and He had massive holes in His hands—they're huge. You could see the wheat blowing through them. The wounds on His hands from the nails were almost like they took a massive amount of flesh out of them. What He suffered, no man can comprehend—those that saw it. It's amazing that the lashes, the wounds that He took upon His back didn't kill Him there on the whipping post. But God, isn't He amazing that He took all of it for you to walk in health, healing, and not have to be bound by the devil's torment, not have to be bound by sickness and disease. He said, "By my stripes, you're healed." But not only that, He carried the cross to Golgotha. He died and He suffered greatly even there with those nails going in His feet and His hands. He got the piercing in His side from the soldier. Isn't Jesus amazing that He did that all for you and me? And He doesn't want that any man should perish, but all come to repentance. Right now, He's leaving the ninety-nine and He's going after the one. Even right now, I'm trying to tell you, you must be born again. Unless a man is born again, he will not enter into the kingdom of God unless you confess Jesus Christ as your Lord and Savior. You're not going to make it. There is no other way to heaven other than by him. I tried to tell you all what's coming: a storm as I saw it. I said, "Pray over the Knicks and the Boston Celtics. Pray over Boston in that marathon this weekend. Pray over the Red Cross. Pray over these things." I see the Red Cross. The Lord said, "intercede for these major cities and for mass transit systems. Pray for the oil wells. Pray for your oil wells in Houston. Pray for them in Tuttle. Pray for them in this." He said because they're a target for you. There is an enemy that is within. There's a mole, as we've heard even President Trump say; there are moles in our camp leaking information. There's all these things. I sense the urgency of the hour today. Diana goes, "What's wrong with you?" I said, "I feel it. I feel the pressure. I feel there's something shifting and I feel there's something wrong. And I'm trying to pray it off, pray it down. I'm interceding in my heart today as I felt it concerning America, concerning President Trump, concerning the decisions he's making, concerning the valley of decision." I said, "I saw a fork in the road," and I said, "It will be determined on how we pray." The Lord said, "Brandon, I'll give you more time. If my people who are called by my name will humble themselves and pray." He said, "I will hear. You will hear from heaven. I will heal your land, Brandon. But look, it's going this way." Do you see it going this way? I could see it. And Donald Trump was going down the path again, the wrong way. Why? I believe that people just want to pray and they go, "Well, Brandon, I just don't have time to dedicate with you, to hear you talk about salvation all the time." You know what? This is a prayer channel. Why aren't you praying more? My heart is the harvest. My heart is prayer, but my heart is definitely the harvest. I know what it feels like to be so lost. And my heart goes out to every single one of you that doesn't know Jesus Christ and you're on the edge of eternity and you could spend eternity in hell and you don't even realize it. The moment you take your last breath, the moment your heart stops beating, where will you spend eternity? And most of you have no clue. This is the most serious hour of any generation that we've ever had touch this earth. We're at the last of the last seconds before the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ. And many of you are still asleep. I plead with you tonight once again: you must become born again. You must invite Jesus Christ to be your Lord and personal Savior. You're running out of time. As we see the wheels and the grinding of eternity and all the things that are happening right now with the end times and the Strait and all the things that are going on with Russia and China and all the stuff. This is an acceleration just like the Lord said. There'll be five major shakings in these last days. There'll be a shaking in the heavens. There'll be a shaking in the earth's crust. There'll be a shaking of politics and wars and rumors of wars. There'll be a shaking in the church. And there'll be a shaking in the finances. And we're seeing it all at one time. People are talking about if we don't get this opened up, if all this stuff going on, it looks like the world is going into a great recession, maybe even a great depression. What are we going to do? The sky is falling, Chicken Little. I said this is all by design. Why? Because it has to have a digital currency to bring forth a one-world digital dollar that will put in your arm, your hand, or your forehead that you will have to scan to pay for stuff in the days ahead. It all is falling into place for the coming of the Lord. Is it five years? Is it two years? Is it seven? I don't know. All I know is I am always looking up because I know my redemption draws nigh. And the moment I know that we start to see the glorious outpouring, I know we're right there. I'm looking for the people and our brothers that are lost, our sisters that are lost, that are wayward, that he's coming and he's going after the 99. He's leaving the 99 to go after the one. Maybe he's going after the 99 and leaving the one because that's how much he wants. He wants them all. I'm telling you, Jesus wants them all. He doesn't want that anyone should perish. Do you understand? John 3:16 is the big one. We put up big banners over everything. John 3:16: "For God so loved the world," brother. But he does and he did. And he's after you. He's after you right now. And I know I've already taken a lot of time trying to talk about what I've talked about, but I want to just do it real quick. If you're here right now and you've never asked Jesus Christ to be your Lord and personal Savior, tonight's your night. No one's promised tomorrow. No one is. You could die in your sleep tonight, but if you did, where would you spend eternity? There's a heaven to gain and a hell to shun. It's time to come off the fence. It's time to stop playing church. There's so many of you all that you're just so close to your breakthrough of what you've been believing for. And the devil's thrown everything he has at you, trying to get you discouraged and to get you to be weary in well-doing. And in doing so, you've walked away from your first love. And he's never left you. He said, "I'll never leave you. I'll never forsake you." But you've turned your back on him. And tonight you have an opportunity to say, "I'm selling out to you. I'm sorry. I repent. I'm coming home." So if that's you tonight and maybe you say, "Brandon, I've never asked Jesus Christ to be my Lord and personal Savior," well, tonight's your night. What are you waiting on? He's at the door of your heart and he's knocking. Will you let him in? No matter if you're a Jew, a Buddhist, or a Muslim, or whatever, Jesus Christ died for you and he wants you to make him your Lord and personal Savior. You must invite him. You've got to confess him. You've got to believe with your heart. So, I want you just to say a simple prayer with me, but I want you to be bold about your decision real quick. Let's do this real quick. We're on the verge. This could be your eternity right here. This is it. All heaven's watching. All hell's anticipating. What are they going to do? Are they going to make the decision tonight? We're going to keep tormenting. We're going to keep beating them down until we get to beat them down even more when they get here if they don't. But heaven's up there going, "You're right there at the goal line. It's time for you to make a touchdown." It's time for you to go and step over and do the greatest decision, the best decision you could ever possibly make is to accept Jesus Christ as your Lord and personal Savior. I want to say a simple prayer for you. A five-year-old could say it. It doesn't have to be religious; it just has to be about relationship and it has to come from your heart. If that's you tonight, say in the comments section right now, "I want to be saved. I want to be saved. Tonight's my night. I want to give it all to Jesus." And I'm just going to pray for you right now. But you have to repeat this prayer after me and say it with your whole heart. Say, "Jesus, I believe you are the Son of God. I believe you died for me and you rose again on the third day. Jesus, I'm a sinner and I need a savior. Jesus, I turn my back tonight on the devil. I turn my back on my sin and I don't want to do it anymore. And from this day forward, I dedicate my heart to you. I dedicate my life to you, Lord. I make you my Lord and personal Savior.
